title: anthropics/claude-code
summary: Anthropic’s public Claude Code repository remains one of the day’s highest-signal AI developer projects, with the terminal-based coding agent, plugins, examples, and documentation active around recent releases.
friendlySummary: This is the public GitHub home for Anthropic’s Claude Code, a coding agent that works from the terminal and development tools.
whyItMatters: Developers can use it to inspect Claude Code’s installation paths, plugin structure, examples, issue activity, and documentation links before standardizing the tool in a team workflow.
friendlyWhyItMatters: Use it to learn how Claude Code is installed, how plugins work, and what has changed recently.
